# ResearchHub

> ResearchHub is an open science platform where researchers publish, peer review, fund, and discuss scientific research. Contributors earn ResearchCoin (RSC) for their work.

ResearchHub's mission is to accelerate the pace of scientific research. It operates as "a GitHub for science" — a collaborative platform for publishing preprints, conducting open peer review, funding research, and discussing findings in topic-specific communities called Hubs. Approved peer reviews earn $150 worth of RSC, all content is published open access, and peer review completes in as few as 14 days. User-contributed content (excluding peer reviews) is licensed under CC BY 4.0. Maintained by the ResearchHub Foundation and ResearchHub, Inc.

Dynamic content follows these URL patterns: papers at `/paper/{id}/{slug}`, topics at `/topic/{slug}`, authors at `/author/{id}`, posts at `/post/{id}/{slug}`, proposals at `/proposal/{id}/{slug}`, and grants at `/grant/{id}/{slug}`.

## Core

- [Home](https://researchhub.com/): Open science community and research platform
- [About](https://researchhub.com/about): Mission, values, and vision
- [Team](https://researchhub.com/team): The people behind ResearchHub
- [Changelog](https://researchhub.com/changelog): Product updates

## Research & Discovery

- [Browse Hubs](https://researchhub.com/browse): Research topics organized into Hubs by discipline
- [Search](https://researchhub.com/search): Search papers, grants, authors, and peer reviews
- [Popular](https://researchhub.com/popular): Popular research ranked by community engagement

## Publishing & Peer Review

- [ResearchHub Journal](https://researchhub.com/journal): Open access, peer-reviewed journal with review in as few as 14 days
- [Earn for Peer Reviews](https://researchhub.com/earn): Approved reviews earn $150 worth of RSC

## Funding

- [Funding Opportunities](https://researchhub.com/fund): Browse open grants and apply for research funding
- [Proposals](https://researchhub.com/fund/proposals): Community research proposals seeking funding
- [Endowment](https://researchhub.com/endowment): Endowment yield and historical performance

## Community

- [Referral Program](https://researchhub.com/referral): Invite researchers and earn rewards

## ResearchCoin (RSC)

ResearchCoin (RSC) is an ERC-20 token earned by contributing to ResearchHub. RSC is used to create bounties, tip users, and fund proposals.

## Connect

- [Website](https://researchhub.com): Main ResearchHub platform
- [Documentation](https://docs.researchhub.com): ResearchHub documentation
- [Foundation](https://researchhub.foundation): ResearchHub Foundation
- [X](https://x.com/researchhub): ResearchHub on X
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ResearchHub): Open-source repositories
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/researchhubtechnologies): ResearchHub on LinkedIn
- [Email](mailto:hello@researchhub.com): hello@researchhub.com

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://researchhub.com/about/privacy): How ResearchHub collects, uses, and protects user data
- [Terms of Service](https://researchhub.com/about/tos): User agreement and terms of use
